items.prompt: Huge high-fanout nets are modeled most naturally by…
items.explain: Nets span many pins; hypergraphs capture that.

items.prompt: KL and FM are refinement methods that improve an existing partition.
items.explain: They move or swap nodes to reduce cut under balance.

items.prompt: A natural next course after clustering is…
items.explain: Partitioning and floorplanning reuse clustering instincts.
